title: Cosmos Remix — Tunnel you can retune and reskin live
summary: Remixable flying tunnel: particles sit on receding rings down a z-axis toward the viewer; each ring's z decreases with u and wraps (mod) so you fly endlessly forward, and a perspective projection (scale=focal/z) makes near rings big and bright while far ones shrink and dim. Live glass control panel retunes palette (brand theme tokens), shape, density, scale, speed, dot size and a Twist knob (rings rotate with depth) in real time; reskins to any brand colour in one click. Demonstrates the PARAMS convention (window.__params + setParam) the generic remix harness reads. Self-contained, zero deps; ?auto=1 hides the panel and renders a deterministic seamless loop.
usage_notes: RUN: open and use the panel (top-right) to retune live — pick a palette to reskin to any brand colour, choose a particle shape, drag Density/Spread/Speed/Dot and the Twist knob, press ↻ Seed, ⧉ Copy to copy your config. KEY TECHNIQUES: a flying tunnel built from rings of particles placed in 3D — each ring's depth z = ((ring/RINGS − u·speed) mod 1)·ZMAX recedes and wraps so the camera flies endlessly forward; points are projected with perspective scale=focal/z (near rings large/bright, far rings tiny/dim via a depth² falloff), and Twist rotates each ring's angle by z·twist so the bore corkscrews into the distance; everything is a pure function of params + time so the panel updates instantly and the capture loop stays deterministic. PARAMS: window.__params describes the knobs and setParam(key,value) applies them — the contract the generic remix harness uses to auto-build panels for ANY effect. Theme tokens = a PALETTES map driving a CSS accent var and the per-index dot ramp; SHAPES draws the chosen glyph cheaply. CAPTURE: ?auto=1 hides the panel + window.__seek(t). TUNE: raise Twist for a corkscrew bore or zero it for straight rings; Scale widens the tunnel; add palettes to PALETTES, extend __params.
